missions.name: Ring-Particle Sampler Servicing
missions.description: The automated ring sampler is jammed — ice particle buildup on the collection aperture. EVA out and clear the inlet by hand.

missions.name: Titan Comms Uplink Restore
missions.description: The Titan relay uplink is broadcasting garbage. Bring up the diagnostic harness, EVA out, and reterminate the main backbone cable.

missions.name: Orbital Asset Servicing
missions.description: On-orbit asset is throwing faults across multiple subsystems. Diagnostics inconclusive — EVA out, find the broken parts, patch them in place.

missions.name: Ring-Plane Telescope Phasing
missions.description: The ring-plane survey telescope is out of phase after a micrometeoroid impact. EVA, read the wavefront sensor, walk each segment back in.
